character.desc_en: Identity-locked character grids — angle studies, expressions, outfits, turnarounds.
character.desc_de: Charakter-Grids mit fixierter Identität — Winkelstudien, Ausdrücke, Outfits, Turnarounds.

world.desc_en: Environment and location grids — zones, continuity, spatial reveals.
world.desc_de: Umgebungs- und Location-Grids — Zonen, Kontinuität, räumliche Reveals.

multishot.desc_en: Sequential narrative grids — film beats, keyframe pairs, progressions.

detail.desc_en: Identity anchors and prop breakdowns — detail crops and knolling layouts.
detail.desc_de: Identity-Anker und Prop-Breakdowns — Detail-Crops und Knolling-Layouts.

technical.desc_en: Production-reference grids — lighting tests, blueprints, spatial diagrams.

other.desc_en: Presets without a category — fallback group.
